title: Generation Effect Explained
script_summary: An exploration of the generation effect, revealing how we remember things better when we actively generate them.

segments.voiceover: What if you could remember more just by creating it yourself?
This is the generation effect, a powerful concept in psychology.
When you generate info—like writing or drawing—your brain retains it better.
Studies show this effect is stronger than just reading or passively learning.
So next time you need to remember something, try creating it yourself!
Curious about more mind hacks? Like and follow for more!
